verses.text: Walk and please God more and more; 'this is the will of God, even your sanctification.' Be holy. God's will is the believer's holiness.
Walk and please God more and more; 'this is the will of God, even your sanctification.' Be holy. God's will is the believer's holiness.
Walk and please God more and more; 'this is the will of God, even your sanctification.' Be holy. God's will is the believer's holiness.
Possess your vessel in honour, not in lust; the Lord is 'the avenger of all such.' Purity. God judges impurity and wrong.
Possess your vessel in honour, not in lust; the Lord is 'the avenger of all such.' Purity. God judges impurity and wrong.
Possess your vessel in honour, not in lust; the Lord is 'the avenger of all such.' Purity. God judges impurity and wrong.
God called us to holiness; he that despiseth despiseth God, 'who hath also given unto us his holy Spirit.' Against God. To scorn this call is to scorn God.
God called us to holiness; he that despiseth despiseth God, 'who hath also given unto us his holy Spirit.' Against God. To scorn this call is to scorn God.
Ye are 'taught of God to love one another'; increase more and more. Growing love. Brotherly love is to abound ever more.
Ye are 'taught of God to love one another'; increase more and more. Growing love. Brotherly love is to abound ever more.
Study to be quiet, do your own business, 'work with your own hands,' walk honestly. Quiet diligence. The Christian works honestly and minds his own.
Study to be quiet, do your own business, 'work with your own hands,' walk honestly. Quiet diligence. The Christian works honestly and minds his own.
Sorrow not as others without hope; 'them... which sleep in Jesus will God bring with him.' Hopeful grief. The dead in Christ are not lost.
Sorrow not as others without hope; 'them... which sleep in Jesus will God bring with him.' Hopeful grief. The dead in Christ are not lost.
Sorrow not as others without hope; 'them... which sleep in Jesus will God bring with him.' Hopeful grief. The dead in Christ are not lost.
'The Lord himself shall descend from heaven... and the dead in Christ shall rise'; we shall be caught up; 'comfort one another.' Blessed hope. The Lord's return is the comfort of the bereaved.
'The Lord himself shall descend from heaven... and the dead in Christ shall rise'; we shall be caught up; 'comfort one another.' Blessed hope. The Lord's return is the comfort of the bereaved.
